appraisal_events.evidence: « Or quand le pianiste eut joué, Swann fut plus aimable encore avec lui qu’avec les autres personnes qui se trouvaient là. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann’s increased amiability toward the pianist after the performance functions as a behavioral sign of favor/admiration, distinguishing the pianist above others present.

status_effects.explanation: Being singled out for greater kindness by Swann locally elevates the pianist’s esteem relative to others in the room.
